findings.closure: The final proof shape-hashes and scans the exact ten-node transitive native closure and rejects 26 root, helper, method, lifecycle, and module variants.
findings.summary: Reachable native helper and method bodies were outside the initial four-root AST freeze.

findings.closure: All seven schemas are substantive; the tree record uses five complete strict positional schemas with items false and directly rejects numeric and missing-field entries.
findings.summary: Initial schemas were shallow, and the first tree-array repair used Draft 2020-12 items semantics incorrectly.
